

[1;2m› [0m[38;5;6m/permissions[39m experimental


[2m• [0mI can’t change permissions directly from here. If you want to run a command or task that needs approval, send it and
  I’ll request escalation when required.


[1;2m› [0mRead README.md and summarize it in one sentence.


[2m• [0mI’ll read the repository README and condense only that content into one sentence.

[2m•[0m [1mExplored[0m
[2m  └ [0m[38;5;6mRead[39m README.md

[2m────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

• [0mCLI Agent Orchestrator (CAO) is a local multi-agent framework that runs existing AI coding CLIs in isolated tmux
  sessions and coordinates them through supervisor-worker workflows over MCP, with CLI, web UI, scheduling, plugins,
  memory, and cross-provider support.

[2m────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  [2mMove up/down to live preview themes[0m
